name: AEON
image: data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 300 400'%3E%3Cdefs%3E%3ClinearGradient id='grad'%3E%3Cstop offset='0%25' style='stop-color:%23C4A070;stop-opacity:1' /%3E%3Cstop offset='100%25' style='stop-color:%23F5E6D3;stop-opacity:1' /%3E%3C/linearGradient%3E%3C/defs%3E%3Crect width='300' height='400' fill='url(%23grad)'/%3E%3Crect x='80' y='80' width='140' height='200' fill='%23D4AF37' opacity='0.3'/%3E%3Crect x='85' y='85' width='130' height='190' fill='%23F5E6D3'/%3E%3Crect x='90' y='90' width='120' height='30' fill='%23C4A070'/%3E%3Ctext x='150' y='220' font-family='serif' font-size='32' fill='%23D4AF37' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'%3EAEON%3C/text%3E%3C/svg%3E
description: AEON is a masterpiece of modern perfumery, blending creamy vanilla with sophisticated tobacco notes. A scent that transcends time, creating an intimate and warm embrace with every application.
story: Inspired by the concept of eternity, AEON represents a timeless moment captured in fragrance. Each note has been carefully selected to create a sensory journey that evolves throughout the day, telling a story of elegance and sophistication.
